notes: Round 2 re-test confirms same blockers. VAL-CROSS-001 and VAL-CROSS-002 require authenticated cursor-agent for E2E testing. /v1/models returns empty list without auth, preventing any chat completions testing. User must run `cursor-agent login` to enable full E2E testing.
